variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP31594 DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20400G60A000P
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP31594 DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20400G60A000P
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHLP31594 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Eppensteiner 20400G60A000P. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP31594
specifications: Style: DIN Pressure Filter, Media: Wire Mesh, Efficiency 1: 60µ, Outer Diameter: 78.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.5 mm, Length: 397.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 21 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 60µ, Media Type: Wire Mesh, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 21 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Filtrec XD400T60A DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20400G60A000P
variants.option1Value: Filtrec XD400T60A DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20400G60A000P
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec XD400T60A. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the XD400T60A provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.

variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 84260 DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20400G60A000P
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 84260 DIN Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 20400G60A000P
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 84260 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
